name: I missed work after injury - can I claim lost wages?
description: Yes, 2/3 of wages via workers comp.[6]

mainEntity.name: I missed work after injury - can I claim lost wages?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, 2/3 of wages via workers comp.[6]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, workers comp reimburses lost wages at 2/3 rate during recovery.[6] Context: Covers full or part-time; self-employed too if documented.[6] Key factors: Doctor release needed; temporary total disability rate applies. Practical guidance: Submit pay stubs; track missed shifts. Employer can't fire for claiming. File even short absences.
